query: INSERT INTO object_presence (workspace_id, object_id, status, location, size, git_oid, status_updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, 'deleting', 'git', 0, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, object_id) DO UPDATE SET status='deleting', git_oid=excluded.git_oid, status_updated_at=excluded.status_updated_at
